title: Proton
description: Proton enhances Minecraft servers with features like rank management, mod chat, vanish mode, and NPC creation. Customize player ranks, toggle chat modes, and spawn NPCs with player skins for a richer server experience.
body:
# Proton Plugin

## Overview

**Proton** is a feature-rich Minecraft plugin designed to provide server administrators and players with a wide array of powerful commands and utilities. Whether you're looking to enhance player interactions, manage server features, or customize gameplay, Proton offers a comprehensive solution. With its extensive set of commands and configurable options, Proton aims to streamline server management and improve the overall gameplay experience.

## Features

### Core Commands

- **/launch**: Quickly propel yourself into the air with this command. Ideal for creating dramatic entrances or for players who enjoy dynamic movement within the game.

- **/fly**: Enable or disable flying for your player. This command provides freedom of movement, allowing players to explore and build without limitations.

- **/vanish**: Temporarily disappear from other players' view with this command. Perfect for admins who need to monitor server activities discreetly.

- **/offlinetp** / **/offtp** / **/pofflinetp** / **/pofftp**: These commands allow teleportation to offline players. They are essential for managing player locations even when players are not online. 

- **/echest** / **/enderchest** / **/pechest** / **/penderchest**: Access the ender chest with different variations of the command. Use these commands to manage personal or other players' ender chests seamlessly.

- **/sethome** / **/delhome** / **/home**: Manage player homes with these commands. Set, delete, or teleport to custom home locations with configurable delays and sound effects.

- **/rank**: Create, manage, and assign ranks with this command. Customize rank colors, manage permissions, and update player display names based on their ranks.

### Additional Utilities

- **VeinMiner**: Automatically mine entire veins of ores with a single swing. This feature significantly speeds up resource gathering and enhances mining efficiency.

- **Xray**: Prevent cheaters from using xray with /xray on|off when doing the command all moderators will get notified when a player mines ores.

- **TreeCapitator**: Chop down entire trees with a single action. This command improves efficiency in gathering wood and enhances the building process.

- **/mute** / **/unmute**: Control chat visibility with these commands. Mute players to prevent spam or disruptive behavior and unmute them when necessary.

## Why Choose Proton?

Proton is designed to offer both functionality and flexibility. It provides essential commands that enhance gameplay, streamline server management, and improve player experience. From dynamic movement commands like **/fly** and **/launch** to advanced server management features such as **/rank** and **/offlinetp**, Proton covers all your server needs.

## Critical Information

- **Compatibility**: Proton is compatible with the latest versions of Minecraft. Ensure your server is up-to-date to utilize all features effectively.

- **Permissions**: Properly configure permissions to ensure commands and features are accessible to the intended players. Proton's command permissions can be customized to fit your server's needs.

- **Configuration**: Adjust the plugin’s configuration settings to tailor commands and features to your server's specific requirements. Review and modify the configuration file as needed.

- **Command Aliases**: Proton supports multiple command aliases for ease of use. Commands such as **/offlinetp**, **/echest**, and others have variations to suit different preferences.

Download Proton today to enhance your Minecraft server with a robust set of commands and utilities that cater to both players and administrators. Elevate your server management and gameplay experience with Proton’s powerful features!

For more information and bug reporting please join the Official [Discord](https://discord.gg/AkZQsxH4Wz)
